title: linaria bicornis
intro: Linaria bicornis, also known as bird's eye, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its distinctive blue and white flowers. The medicinal properties of Linaria bicornis include its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, Linaria bicornis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to address conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and skin irritations.
